name: Mathematics 101
description: Introduction to Algebra and Geometry. This course covers fundamental algebraic concepts including linear equations, quadratic equations, functions, and basic geometric principles.
syllabus:
Week 1-4: Linear Equations
Week 5-8: Quadratic Equations
Week 9-12: Functions and Graphs
Week 13-16: Geometry Fundamentals
learning_objectives: Solve linear and quadratic equations
Understand and graph functions
Apply geometric principles to real-world problems
Develop problem-solving and analytical thinking skills

name: English Literature
description: Study of classic and modern literature. Explore literary analysis, critical thinking, and writing skills through examination of diverse texts.
syllabus:
Week 1-4: Poetry Analysis
Week 5-8: Short Stories
Week 9-12: Novel Study
Week 13-16: Drama and Performance
learning_objectives: Analyze literary texts using various critical approaches
Write clear and persuasive analytical essays
Understand historical and cultural contexts of literature
Develop close reading skills

name: Physics
description: Fundamental principles of physics. Introduction to mechanics, energy, waves, and basic thermodynamics with hands-on laboratory work.
syllabus:
Week 1-4: Kinematics and Motion
Week 5-8: Forces and Energy
Week 9-12: Waves and Sound
Week 13-16: Thermodynamics Basics
learning_objectives: Understand fundamental laws of physics
Apply mathematical concepts to physical problems
Conduct scientific experiments and analyze data
Develop scientific reasoning and critical thinking

name: World History
description: Global historical events and civilizations. Survey of major world civilizations and their impact on modern society.
syllabus:
Week 1-4: Ancient Civilizations
Week 5-8: Medieval Period
Week 9-12: Renaissance and Enlightenment
Week 13-16: Modern World History
learning_objectives: Understand major historical events and their significance
Analyze cause and effect relationships in history
Evaluate primary and secondary historical sources
Connect historical events to contemporary issues

name: Computer Science
description: Introduction to programming and algorithms. Learn fundamental programming concepts using Python and develop algorithmic thinking.
syllabus:
Week 1-4: Python Basics
Week 5-8: Data Structures
Week 9-12: Algorithms
Week 13-16: Object-Oriented Programming
learning_objectives: Write programs using Python
Understand fundamental data structures
Design and analyze algorithms
Apply object-oriented programming principles
